task_completion.description: Create a new tax return profile for Chloe Tremblay in StudioTax 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax 2024 is open with the Personal Information or Identification screen showing the first name 'Chloe' and last name 'Tremblay'.

task_completion.description: Enter the T4 employment income of $8,500.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T4 slip data entry screen in StudioTax showing an amount of $8,500 entered, typically in Box 14 (Employment income).

task_completion.description: Enter the T4A scholarship of $5,000 and T2202 tuition certificate for 8 months full-time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T4A slip entry screen showing $5,000 (likely in Box 105 for scholarships) AND a T2202 entry screen showing 8 months entered in the full-time months column.

task_completion.description: Enter the T5 dividend of $25,000 in Box 10.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A T5 slip data entry screen showing $25,000 entered in Box 10 (Actual amount of dividends).

task_completion.description: Flag the T5 dividend for Tax on Split Income (TOSI) / Form T1206.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A specific checkbox, dropdown, or field on the T5 entry screen is selected to indicate the dividend is subject to TOSI, OR Form T1206 is open and populated with the $25,000 dividend amount.

task_completion.description: Save the completed return as 'chloe_tremblay.24t' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box showing the file name 'chloe_tremblay.24t' in the 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' directory, or the main StudioTax window title bar displaying this filename after saving.

integrity.description: The agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the StudioTax 2024 application menus and forms, rather than editing a .24t file directly in a text editor or using terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The agent entered data into the specific tax slip forms (T4, T4A, T2202, T5).
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the actual slip entry windows being filled out, rather than the agent attempting to bypass data entry by overriding final summary lines.

integrity.description: The agent saved the file using the application's native save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent using 'File -> Save' or 'File -> Save As' within StudioTax, rather than moving or renaming files via the command prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Taxpayer Name: Chloe Tremblay. Expected Output Path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\chloe_tremblay.24t. Key Complexity: The $25,000 T5 dividend must be explicitly flagged for Tax on Split Income (TOSI) so it flows to Form T1206. The T4A scholarship ($5,000) and T2202 (8 months full-time) must also be entered.
